name: facility managers in commercial real estate managing 5-10 properties tool
description: For facility managers in commercial real estate managing 5-10 properties, unplanned equipment failures cause costly repairs and downtime. We provide predictive maintenance instead of reactive maintenance schedules based on equipment failure history.

problem_solved: unplanned equipment failures leading to costly repairs and downtime
